findings.description: The doc says 'up to max_attempts times' but op() executes max_attempts + 1 times: attempt is incremented after the call and the loop only returns Err when attempt > max_attempts.
The backoff 100 * 2u64.pow(attempt) is uncapped; with a large max_attempts the multiplication overflows u64 (panicking in debug builds) and sleep durations grow without bound.
